title: Blastomycosis - Canada.ca
content:
Learn about blastomycosis, its causes, symptoms, risks, treatment and prevention. Also find information on surveillance and guidance for health professionals.

## Services and information
Explore the causes of blastomycosis and how it is spread.
Learn about the symptoms, what to look for and what to do if you become ill.
Find out what the risks are and who is most at risk.
Access information on how blastomycosis is diagnosed and treated.
Learn how blastomycosis can be prevented.
Discover how the disease is monitored.

### For health professionals
Get detailed information for health professionals.
- Public Health Agency of Canada
